EmailTemplate.description: A Thank You email to Household Accounts for donations (opportunities)
EmailTemplate.name: NPPatch Opportunity Acknowledgment
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank you!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Account.Informal_Greeting__c},
Thank you for your gift of {!Opportunity.Amount} on {!Opportunity.CloseDate}.
We greatly appreciate your support!
From all of us at {!Organization.Name}
